examples.title: FCFS Scheduling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM FCFS
BEGIN
  queue = request_queue
  total_movement = 0
  current_position = initial_head
  
  FOR each request IN queue:
    total_movement += abs(current_position - request)
    current_position = request
  END FOR
  
  RETURN total_movement
END
examples.explanation: Processes requests in arrival order, accumulates total head movement
